description_long: This object is a desktop computer setup consisting of a flat widescreen monitor, a rectangular tower case, a full-sized keyboard, and a standard mouse. The monitor features a broad, slightly curved display with a thin, matte bezel and is supported by a sturdy, angular stand. The tower case is boxy with visible ventilation grilles and a few subtle details on the front panel, while cables connect the monitor, keyboard, and mouse to the tower. The keyboard is elongated with a standard key layout, and the mouse is compact and rounded. The entire setup is predominantly black, giving it a modern, utilitarian appearance. No visible branding or decorative elements are present, and the ports or buttons are not clearly visible from any angle.
description: A modern black desktop computer setup with a widescreen monitor, tower case, keyboard, and mouse, all connected by visible cables. The monitor has a thin bezel and angular stand, and the setup is visually sleek and utilitarian.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the tower case and the monitor's thin profile, with cables trailing behind.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the monitor, the angular stand, and the rear panel of the tower case with visible ventilation.
description_view_2: Angled view displaying the monitor's back, the keyboard's layout, and the mouse positioned in front of the tower.
description_view_3: Front view showing the full display area of the monitor, the keyboard, mouse, and the front panel of the tower case.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, matte, and black, with straight edges and no visible decorative elements or color contrast. It appears uniform in thickness and has slightly rounded corners.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a wide, angular pedestal with a flat base, made of plastic or metal, providing stable support for the monitor.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on the monitor from any angle.
